title: Standard IV Induction — Healthy Adult
description: A healthy adult for elective surgery. Demonstrate that mask ventilation is possible before giving neuromuscular blockade, then continue positive-pressure ventilation during onset.
learningObjectives: Confirm adequate mask ventilation before administering neuromuscular blockade
Continue positive-pressure ventilation while awaiting blockade onset
Complete timed intubation in fewer than three attempts

history: Healthy adult presenting for elective surgery

debrief.summary: Standard IV induction requires proving that mask ventilation is possible before neuromuscular blockade and maintaining ventilation through onset.
teachingPoints: The scoreable discriminator is adequate mask PPV before the first neuromuscular blocker.
Timed laryngoscopy has a real oxygenation cost and should begin only after preparation.
